--- Spec: Bitwise OR for non-negative integers ---\nghost function BitwiseOr(a: int, b: int): int\n  requires a >= 0 && b >= 0\n  ensures BitwiseOr(a, b) >= 0\n  decreases a + b\n{\n  if a == 0 && b == 0 then 0\n  else\n    (if a % 2 == 1 || b % 2 == 1 then 1 else 0) + 2 * BitwiseOr(a / 2, b / 2)\n}\n\n// --- Spec: OR of all elements in a non-empty sequence ---\nghost function OrOfSeq(s: seq<int>): int\n  requires |s| > 0\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |s| :: s[i] >= 0\n  ensures OrOfSeq(s) >= 0\n  decreases |s|\n{\n  if |s| == 1 then s[0]\n  else BitwiseOr(OrOfSeq(s[..|s|-1]), s[|s|-1])\n}\n\n// --- Spec: p is a permutation of [1..n] ---\nghost predicate IsPermutation(p: seq<int>, n: int)\n{\n  n >= 0 &&\n  |p| == n &&\n  (forall i | 0 <= i < n :: 1 <= p[i] <= n) &&\n  (forall i, j | 0 <= i < j < n :: p[i] != p[j])\n}\n\n// --- Spec: every subarray's bitwise OR >= the subarray's length ---\nghost predicate IsGood(p: seq<int>)\n{\n  (forall k | 0 <= k < |p| :: p[k] >= 0) &&\n  (forall i, j | 0 <= i <= j < |p| :: OrOfSeq(p[i..j+1]) >= j - i + 1)\n}\n\n// --- Helper lemmas ---\n\nlemma BitwiseOrGeqLeft(a: int, b: int)\n  requires a >= 0 && b >= 0\n  ensures BitwiseOr(a, b) >= a\n  decreases a + b\n{\n  if a == 0 && b == 0 {\n  } else {\n    BitwiseOrGeqLeft(a / 2, b / 2);\n  }\n}\n\nlemma BitwiseOrGeqRight(a: int, b: int)\n  requires a >= 0 && b >= 0\n  ensures BitwiseOr(a, b) >= b\n  decreases a + b\n{\n  if a == 0 && b == 0 {\n  } else {\n    BitwiseOrGeqRight(a / 2, b / 2);\n  }\n}\n\nlemma OrOfSeqGeqElement(s: seq<int>, idx: int)\n  requires |s| > 0\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < |s| :: s[i] >= 0\n  requires 0 <= idx < |s|\n  ensures OrOfSeq(s) >= s[idx]\n  decreases |s|\n{\n  if |s| == 1 {\n  } else if idx == |s| - 1 {\n    BitwiseOrGeqRight(OrOfSeq(s[..|s|-1]), s[|s|-1]);\n  } else {\n    OrOfSeqGeqElement(s[..|s|-1], idx);\n    BitwiseOrGeqLeft(OrOfSeq(s[..|s|-1]), s[|s|-1]);\n  }\n}\n\nmethod GoodPermutation(n: int) returns (p: seq<int>)\n  requires n >= 1\n  ensures IsPermutation(p, n)\n  ensures IsGood(p)\n{\n  p := [];\n  var i := 1;\n  while i <= n\n    invariant 1 <= i <= n + 1\n    invariant |p| == i - 1\n    invariant forall k | 0 <= k < |p| :: p[k] == k + 1\n  {\n    p := p + [i];\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n\n  assert |p| == n;\n  assert forall k | 0 <= k < n :: p[k] == k + 1;\n\n  // Prove IsGood: every subarray's OR >= its length\n  forall ii, jj | 0 <= ii <= jj < |p|\n    ensures OrOfSeq(p[ii..jj+1]) >= jj - ii + 1\n  {\n    var sub := p[ii..jj+1];\n    // sub[jj - ii] == p[jj] == jj + 1, which is >= jj - ii + 1 since ii >= 0\n    assert sub[jj - ii] == p[jj] == jj + 1;\n    OrOfSeqGeqElement(sub, jj - ii);\n  }\n}\n\nmethod ExpectedPermutation(n: int) returns (e: seq<int>)\n{\n  e := [];\n  var i := 1;\n  while i <= n\n  {\n    e := e + [i];\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":11723,"cache_read_input_tokens":8610,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":11723},"output_tokens":11,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"93637235-2893-4777-ad12-d96e718449aa","uuid":"fa68c75b-277d-4cdb-8bda-3db50298e1bc"},{"type":"rate_limit_event","rate_limit_info":{"status":"allowed","resetsAt":1773824400,"rateLimitType":"five_hour","overageStatus":"rejected","overageDisabledReason":"org_level_disabled","isUsingOverage":false},"uuid":"dddf5931-7c23-4290-addb-08b51f4ca4cf","session_id":"93637235-2893-4777-ad12-d96e718449aa"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017Rh1YnZSxbkv8D1E6xMKRu","type":"tool_result","content":"File
